title: Failed authentication after Xano plan upgrade
symptom: Users are unable to log into their live Weweb app after upgrading their Xano plan, receiving a 'failed authentication' error.
applies_when: Changed base URL settings in Weweb
not_this_if: App was published after changing settings
root_cause: After changing the base URL settings for the Xano instance, the Weweb app must be published for the changes to take effect. If the app is not published, authentication may fail due to mismatched URLs.
fix_steps: Change the base URL settings in Weweb if necessary
agent_instruction: Ensure the Weweb app is published after changing the base URL settings.
